name: Sesame Asparagus
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat sesame oil in a skillet until smoking.
2. Add sesame seeds, garlic, shallot, and ginger. Stir-fry for about 1 minute.
3. Add sliced asparagus and stir-fry for another 1 minute.
4. Add bean sprouts and red bell pepper. Continue stirring for 1 more minute.
5. Remove from heat.
6. Stir in soy sauce and lime juice. Toss well to combine.
